task: pick redbull can from middle drawer and place on counter
raw:

Step 1: reach(redbull_can)
  affordance_region: the redbull can in the middle drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, redbull_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, redbull_can) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(redbull_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the redbull can
  contact: holding(redbull_can) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]

Step 3: transport(redbull_can -> counter)
  affordance_region: the empty area on the gray counter
  spatial: above(redbull_can, counter, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(redbull_can)
  done_when: above(redbull_can, counter, 0.05)
Step 4: place(redbull_can -> counter)
  affordance_region: the empty area on the gray counter
  contact: surface_contact(redbull_can, counter) [completion]; released(redbull_can) [completion]
  pose: stable(redbull_can) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(redbull_can, counter) AND released(redbull_can) AND stable(redbull_can)
<END_OF_PLAN>
